text: Had the kickoff call with Sarah. Everything looks solid for Q3 rollout.
Sarah emailed saying they need a slight extension on invoice #409. Promised to process the payment by 2026-05-30.
Still haven't received the wire. Called their AP department and they promised to expedite the payment by 2026-06-10.
Radio silence. Emailed Sarah and AP twice this week. Frustration is high on our end.
Sent formal notice of account suspension if balance isn't cleared.
Legal team is now involved. Not looking good.
Quarterly review went exceptionally well. They are loving the new dashboard features.
CTO wants to discuss upgrading to the Enterprise tier next month. Huge win.
Onboarding wrapped up. Promised to ship the physical welcome kit by 2026-05-25.
Bill called furious about the v2.4 patch breaking their integration. Promised to push a hotfix by 2026-06-15.
Absolute disaster. The hotfix didn't resolve the issue and Bill is threatening to cancel the contract. Escalating to VP immediately.
Placed PO-992 for the servers. They promised to finalize delivery by 2026-05-20.
Tracking shows stuck in transit. Account manager apologized and promised to ensure delivery by 2026-06-01.
Still no servers. This is holding up our entire staging environment. They promised to complete delivery by 2026-06-15.
Components arrived 4 days ahead of schedule. Flawless execution as always.
Tony reached out about an upcoming silicon shortage to help us pre-order. Very proactive.
Just placed a massive bulk order for Q4. They gave us a nice 5% volume discount.
Contracts are signed! They promised to schedule the kickoff meeting by 2026-06-23.
Bruce sent over their technical requirements. Reviewing with the engineering team.
Engineering approved the requirements. Moving forward with the setup.
